visual_logic: Subgroup trends slope upward while the aggregate arrangement slopes downward. The diptych contrasts local perception against global reality, embodying the paradox's core reversal without using data or text.
insight: At the aggregate level, men had a 44% admission rate vs 35% for women. However, when stratified by department, women actually had higher admission rates in 4 out of 6 major departments because they applied to more competitive programs.
